advancedDetailsHelp.message: Configure advanced metadata viewing and supported advanced editing in the Details pane.

allowKeyboardDelete.message: Allow Delete key to delete selected items

allowKeyboardDeleteHelp.message: When disabled, the Delete key no longer deletes selected bookmark entries.

appDescription.message: A simple local bookmarks manager for Chromium browsers, inspired by Firefox Places, Firefox’s bookmark management system.

chooseSortModeTitle.message: Choose the middle-pane sort mode. Default uses Chromium’s folder order.

debugOptionsHelp.message: Advanced. Shows debug-only test controls. Leave disabled during normal use.

debugSettingsHelp.message: Controls shown only when Debug options is enabled.

doubleClickExpandCollapseTitle.message: Double-click to expand or collapse this folder

dragItemTitle.message: Drag to move or reorder this item

emptyDetails.message: Select one item, or select a folder to show its contents.

enableAdvancedEditingHelp.message: Allow supported advanced editing, currently limited to bookmark index changes.

enableAdvancedViewingHelp.message: Show read-only advanced bookmark metadata in the Details pane.

folderContentsViewHelp.message: Configure middle-pane column widths and optional columns. Name and URL are always shown.

fontHelp.message: Controls the main font family used by the bookmark manager UI.

fontSizeHelp.message: Base text size. Headings and column labels scale relative to this value.

fontSpacingHelp.message: Line spacing multiplier for denser or more readable rows and labels.

leftLibWidthHelp.message: Width in pixels for the left Library pane.

midFcShowDateAddedHelp.message: Show or hide the Date Added column in the Folder Contents pane.

midFcShowIdHelp.message: Show or hide the Chromium bookmark ID column.

midFcShowOrderHelp.message: Show or hide the Chromium folder order/index column.

midFcWidthDateAddedHelp.message: Width in pixels for the optional Date Added column.

midFcWidthIdHelp.message: Width in pixels for the optional ID column.

midFcWidthNameHelp.message: Width in pixels for the Folder Contents Name column.

midFcWidthOrderHelp.message: Width in pixels for the optional Chromium order/index column.

midFcWidthUrlHelp.message: Width in pixels for the Folder Contents URL column.

multipleInstancesAllowedHelp.message: When disabled, clicking the extension button focuses the existing Simple Bookmarks Manager tab instead of opening another one.

naturalSortHelp.message: Permanent Sort by Name places folders first, separators next, then bookmarks.

openAllInNewTabGroup.message: Open All in New Tab Group

optimisationDOMrenderingHelp.message: Experimental. Enables reduced DOM churn for selected rendering, drag/drop indicators, and row icon handling. Disable only when comparing performance or troubleshooting UI behavior.

optimisationTempBookmarkTreeMapsHelp.message: Experimental. Builds short-lived lookup maps during some render/search/tree operations, then discards them to avoid a persistent stale cache.

optimisationsHelp.message: Experimental performance options for benchmarking and troubleshooting.

paneWidthsHelp.message: Configure the Library and Details pane widths. These are also updated when panes are resized in the manager UI.

rightDetailsWidthHelp.message: Width in pixels for the right Details pane.

searchLimitFull.message: Limit Search to Current Folder & Subfolders

searchLimitOptionHelp.message: When enabled, the main search box searches only inside the current visible folder tree.

searchLimitTitle.message: When enabled, search only the current folder and its subfolders. When disabled, search all bookmarks.

showDeleteWarningHelp.message: Ask before deleting bookmark items or folders.

showErrorsWarningsHelp.message: Advanced. Shows a transient in-memory log for this SBM session. Log entries are not saved to extension settings.

showSortWarningHelp.message: Ask before applying context-menu sorts that permanently reorder a bookmark folder.

sortDateAscTooltip.message: Sort by date added: oldest first

sortDateDescTooltip.message: Sort by date added: newest first

sortDefaultTooltip.message: Default Chromium folder order. Click to return to Default sorting; this column does not reverse-sort.

sortFolderConfirm.message:
Sort "{folderName}" by {sortName}?

This permanently changes the saved bookmark order in Chromium. It is different from the temporary Visual sort dropdown.

sortNameAscTooltip.message: Sort by name: A to Z

sortNameDescTooltip.message: Sort by name: Z to A

sortSelectDateAddedTitle.message: Date added sort. Ascending is oldest first; descending is newest first.

sortSelectIdTitle.message: ID sort. Ascending is lowest first; descending is highest first.

sortSelectTitleTitle.message: Name sort. Ascending is A to Z; descending is Z to A.

sortSelectUrlTitle.message: URL sort. Ascending is A to Z; descending is Z to A.

sortUrlAscTooltip.message: Sort by URL: A to Z

sortUrlDescTooltip.message: Sort by URL: Z to A

unsavedChangesMessage.message: The Details pane has unsaved changes. What would you like to do?

urlWarningControlCharacters.message: URL contained hidden control characters; they will be removed before saving.

urlWarningEmpty.message: URL is empty. Chrome may reject this bookmark until a URL is provided.

urlWarningInvalidBlocked.message: This URL is not valid enough to save as a bookmark. Fix the URL before saving.

urlWarningInvalidButAllowed.message: This URL is not valid enough to save as a bookmark. Fix the URL before saving.

urlWarningWhitespace.message: URL contains whitespace. It will be saved if Chrome accepts it, but it may not open as expected.

userInterfaceLanguageHelp.message: Automatic follows the browser UI language. Manual choices affect the manager and options pages.

warningsErrorsLogEmpty.message: No warnings or errors recorded for this session.

warningsErrorsLogHelp.message: Transient warnings/errors for this current SBM session. This is not saved to settings.

bookmarkUrlProtectionsHelp.message: Control protections for higher-risk bookmark URL schemes. These protections affect opening bookmarks only, not saving them.

blockJavascriptBookmarkOpensHelp.message: Recommended. Prevents SBM from opening bookmarklets or other javascript: URLs through extension tab/window actions.

blockDataBookmarkOpensHelp.message: Recommended. Prevents SBM from opening inline data: documents through extension tab/window actions.

blockBlobBookmarkOpensHelp.message: Recommended. Prevents SBM from opening blob: URLs through extension tab/window actions.

urlOpenBlockedByProtection.message: This bookmark URL is blocked by an advanced URL-opening protection. You can review the protection toggles in Options > Advanced.
